title: Lightning LNURL-pay Handler Config
description: Configuration for the network.lightning.lnurl-pay payment handler. The Business advertises an LNURL-pay endpoint or a Lightning Address; the Platform executes the LUD-06 flow to obtain a BOLT11.

lightning_address.description: Lightning Address in the form user@host. Resolves to https://{host}/.well-known/lnurlp/{user}.

lnurl.description: LNURL-pay endpoint — either bech32-encoded (lnurl1...) or a direct https:// URL. Use a per-checkout dynamic URL when LUD-12 comments are unavailable.

display_name.description: Optional human-readable label for payment-method UI.

comment_supported.description: Whether the endpoint accepts an LUD-12 comment parameter long enough to carry checkout_id. If false or omitted, Platforms MUST rely on a per-checkout dynamic URL for binding.
